description: Tensor/combination CTR isolation (ORD-05, the last rung of the additive ladder). max_ctr_complexity=2 plus an explicit combinations_ctr enables a 2-feature combination projection whose hash folds the two cat columns via MultiHash (ctr_provider.h) before the online CTR accumulation. Two cat features each above one_hot_max_size so the combination is genuinely formed.

npy_schema.ctr_good_count.npy: [N] int32 — exact numerator over the combination projection bucket
